html:
Exclusive to:

LoadedEmptyNothing to load

“Can be loaded with cannonballs. Once loaded, it can be aimed to fire. The direction can be changed by standing next to it from different sides before aiming.”

-

The Cannon can be loaded with Cannonballs and be fired at a target in front of it. The Cannon's range of attack depends on the player's position, it will aim towards the opposite direction from where the player is standing which allows the Cannon to fire in any direction.

Cannons can be placed on a Boat or on the ground. Boats get pushed back in the opposite direction of a shot. On Moon Quay, Cannons can be found on Docks inhabited by Powder Monkeys, who use them as weapons and shoot at any approaching player Boats.

Cannons will not hit structures and walls on the same boat it was fired from, but they will still hit and hurt other things on the same boat like normal.

Cannon Kit

The Cannon Kit is a craftable structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update. Its crafting recipe can be obtained from the Queen of Moon Quay in exchange for Bananas if the player does not have any Accursed Trinkets. Once obtained the recipe can be found in the Sailing Filter.


Trivia

  • If you accidentally set fire to a loaded cannon, it will shoot.

Gallery

  • Concept art of the Cannon shown in Rhymes With Play stream.
  • Concept art of the Cannon shown in Rhymes With Play stream.
  • Old Boat cannon from Don't Starve: Newhome beta files.
  • Old Boat cannon loaded from Don't Starve: Newhome beta files.
  • Old Boat cannon launch pre from Don't Starve: Newhome beta files.
  • Old Boat cannon launch pst from Don't Starve: Newhome beta files.
  • Old Boat cannon loaded pre from Don't Starve: Newhome beta files.

Exclusive to:
Cannon
Object Info
Can be Burned
Source
Can be Hammered
Miscellaneous
"boat_cannon"
LoadedEmptyNothing to load
“The cannon is ready to fire!”
–Wilson
“The only fun part of sailing is getting to fire the cannon.”
–Willow
“Is ready for firing!”
–Wolfgang
“What irreparable damage will it cause?”
–Wendy
“IT MAKES THE HORRIBLE BOAT SLIGHTLY BETTER”
–WX-78
“It is not a plaything.”
–Wickerbottom
“There's a big seabird out there I'd love to introduce you to.”
–Woodie
“Don't test me.”
–Maxwell
“Ready for battle!”
–Wigfrid
“We know we shouldn't play with it, but Willow says it's so much fun...”
–Webber
“Is it too much to hope for a peaceful voyage?”
–Warly
“Boom!”
–Wormwood
“All you sea critters better think twice about messing with my boat!”
–Winona
“Ready to fire, but decidedly unready to brimstone.”
–Wortox
“Wanna play, wanna play!”
–Wurt
“It's kind of like a giant slingshot, if you think about it.”
–Walter
“It never hurts to take precautions.”
–Wanda
“I should load it with something.”
–Wilson
“It isn't loaded? Booooring.”
–Willow
“Cannon is empty, but still very scary looking!”
–Wolfgang
“It's empty inside...”
–Wendy
“REQUIRES AMMUNITION”
–WX-78
“A highly effective weapon in nautical combat, when properly loaded.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks like it could do some damage... if it was actually loaded.”
–Woodie
“It's useless if it isn't loaded.”
–Maxwell
“Load the cannons!”
–Wigfrid
“Ms. Wickerbottom said we could play with it as long as there's no cannonballs inside.”
–Webber
“Its belly is empty.”
–Warly
“Empty”
–Wormwood
“It won't do much good if it's not loaded.”
–Winona
“Rounded stones are required for this cannon to fire.”
–Wortox
“It not ready yet!”
–Wurt
“I'll load the cannonball!”
–Walter
“I could have sworn I loaded that cannon... maybe it hasn't happened yet.”
–Wanda
“I didn't forget the cannonballs, I'm just letting the anticipation build.”
–Wilson
“Darn it, I'm out... hey Wes, you always wanted to try being a human cannonball right?”
–Willow
“Ah. Wolfgang forgot cannonballs.”
–Wolfgang
“I have nothing that can fill the void... of this empty cannon.”
–Wendy
“ERROR: CANNONBALLS NOT FOUND”
–WX-78
“There's still the small matter of ammunition, dear...”
–Wickerbottom
“I can't just load it with any old thing, eh?”
–Woodie
“Tragically, I can't just summon cannonballs out of thin air.”
–Maxwell
“Woe! There is nary a cannonball in sight!”
–Wigfrid
“Oh, we forgot to bring the cannonballs!”
–Webber
“Ah zut! I have nothing to fill its belly.”
–Warly
“Oops! Forgot rocks”
–Wormwood
“I won't be able to do much without some cannonballs.”
–Winona
“This cannon cannot fire.”
–Wortox
“Glurgh... forget to bring cannon rocks...”
–Wurt
“I forgot the cannonballs! This won't make me lose points toward my badge, right?”
–Walter
“Next time I'll remember to bring cannonballs.”
–Wanda
“Can be loaded with cannonballs. Once loaded, it can be aimed to fire. The direction can be changed by standing next to it from different sides before aiming.”
-
The Cannon can be loaded with Cannonballs and be fired at a target in front of it. The Cannon's range of attack depends on the player's position, it will aim towards the opposite direction from where the player is standing which allows the Cannon to fire in any direction.
Cannons can be placed on a Boat or on the ground. Boats get pushed back in the opposite direction of a shot. On Moon Quay, Cannons can be found on Docks inhabited by Powder Monkeys, who use them as weapons and shoot at any approaching player Boats.
Cannons will not hit structures and walls on the same boat it was fired from, but they will still hit and hurt other things on the same boat like normal.
Cannon Kit[edit | edit source]
Cannon Kit
"It blows the competition out of the water."
Object Info
3 min.
Does not stack
Crafting
×4 ×1 ×4
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"boat_cannon_kit"
“It's not a cannon yet, but it will be.”
–Wilson
“If I build it, I get to fire it.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang will make mighty cannon for ship.”
–Wolfgang
“A creation of destruction.”
–Wendy
“IT WILL BE BUILT FOR VIOLENCE”
–WX-78
“A necessary precaution, unfortunately.”
–Wickerbottom
“That cannon won't build itself, eh?”
–Woodie
“Fine. I suppose the task of building it is left to me.”
–Maxwell
“We must be prepared for a battle at sea.”
–Wigfrid
“If we build it, can we play with it?”
–Webber
“All the ingredients needed for a fresh cannon.”
–Warly
“Things for Boom maker”
–Wormwood
“I'll get 'er firin' ready in no time.”
–Winona
“I'll build it quick, then put it on the ship.”
–Wortox
“Buildy bits for boat stuff.”
–Wurt
“I've got all the supplies I need to build a cannon.”
–Walter
“I'd better get that on my boat sooner rather than later.”
–Wanda
The Cannon Kit is a craftable structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update. Its crafting recipe can be obtained from the Queen of Moon Quay in exchange for Bananas if the player does not have any Accursed Trinkets. Once obtained the recipe can be found in the Sailing Filter.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
If you accidentally set fire to a loaded cannon, it will shoot.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Pháo có thể được nạp đạn đại bác và bắn vào mục tiêu phía trước nó. Phạm vi tấn công của Pháo phụ thuộc vào vị trí của người chơi, nó sẽ nhắm về hướng ngược lại với nơi người chơi đang đứng, cho phép Pháo bắn theo bất kỳ hướng nào.

{{Scrapbook_Info|Can be loaded with cannonballs. Once loaded, it can be aimed to fire. The direction can be changed by standing next to it from different sides before aiming.}}
The '''Cannon''' can be loaded with [[Cannonball]]s and be fired at a target in front of it. The Cannon's range of attack depends on the player's position, it will aim towards the opposite direction from where the player is standing which allows the Cannon to fire in any direction.

Cannons can be placed on a Boat or on the ground. Boats get pushed back in the opposite direction of a shot. On [[Moon Quay]], Cannons can be found on [[Dock]]s inhabited by [[Powder Monkey]]s, who use them as weapons and shoot at any approaching player Boats.

Cannons will not hit structures and walls on the same boat it was fired from, but they will still hit and hurt other things on the same boat like normal.

{{Clear}}

The '''Cannon Kit''' is a craftable structure exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' introduced in ''[[The Curse of Moon Quay]]'' update. Its crafting recipe can be obtained from the [[Queen of Moon Quay]] in exchange for [[Banana]]s if the player does not have any [[Accursed Trinket]]s. Once obtained the recipe can be found in the Sailing Filter.


== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==

* If you accidentally set fire to a loaded cannon, it will shoot.
